name: Rhode Island Clam Cakes
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Lard, or more, For deep frying
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix the flour, baking powder, salt, and pepper.
2. Beat the eggs in a separate bowl.
3. Gradually add the milk to the dry ingredients, mixing until just combined.
4. Stir in the canned clams with their liquid.
5. Gently fold in the beaten eggs.
6. Heat the lard in a deep fryer or heavy pot to 375°F (190°C).
7. Drop spoonfuls of the batter into the hot lard.
8. Fry until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes per side.
9. Remove the cakes from the oil and drain on paper towels.
10. Season with additional salt and pepper after cooking.
